items.definition_en: A plan or method used to win a board or card game.
items.example_en: Her strategy helped her win the game quickly.

items.definition_en: A small object used by players to represent their position or role in a game.
items.example_en: Each player picked a different game piece to use.

items.definition_en: The person who gives out the cards in a card game.
items.example_en: You are the dealer for this round.

items.definition_en: A board for keeping track of players' points.
items.example_en: The scoreboard showed that he was in the lead.

items.definition_en: A pile of cards placed face down or face up.
items.example_en: Draw a card from the stack.

items.definition_en: A player who handles the money or coins in a board game.
items.example_en: She acted as the banker during Monopoly.

items.definition_en: A flat piece used in games like Scrabble or Mahjong.
items.example_en: I placed the letter tile on the board.

items.definition_en: A stack of cards from which players take new cards.
items.example_en: Take a card from the draw pile.

items.definition_en: A pile where used or unwanted cards are placed.
items.example_en: Put your used card on the discard pile.

items.definition_en: A special card that can replace another card in some games.
items.example_en: You can use the joker as any card you need.

items.definition_en: A small playing piece in chess and other board games.
items.example_en: I moved my pawn forward two squares.

items.definition_en: The cards a player holds at one time.
items.example_en: Each player started with a hand of five cards.

items.definition_en: A domino tile with six spots on both ends.
items.example_en: He placed the double six tile to start the game.

items.definition_en: A small figure used to represent a player in board games.
items.example_en: Move your red meeple to the city space.

items.definition_en: One of the four types in a deck, like hearts or spades.
items.example_en: He had three cards of the same suit.

items.definition_en: A playing card marked with a single symbol, often the highest or lowest.
items.example_en: The ace of spades is her favorite card.

items.definition_en: The act of taking a card from the deck or pile.
items.example_en: It's your turn to make a draw.

items.definition_en: A special help or advantage given to a player in a game.
items.example_en: She used her last lifeline to stay in the game.

items.definition_en: The action or result of throwing dice in a game.
items.example_en: You need a good roll to win this round.

items.definition_en: A move where a player pretends to have a better hand or position.
items.example_en: His bluff fooled everyone at the table.
